title: Doors Like Shield
description: This mod will diversify the minecraft game! It allows you to use doors as shields.
body: This mod allows you to use doors as SHIELDS! Namely, distorted, crimson, spruce, pale oak, oak, dark oak, mangrove, tropical, iron, copper, cherry, birch, bamboo and acacia! You will find all the doors in the invert of the creative menu, in the tab on which the diamond pickaxe is depicted. Luck in the game!
